# DentCast — پادکست علمی دندانپزشکی

> DentCast is a Persian-language scientific dental podcast and education platform by Dr. Foad Shahabian (Prosthodontist). Covers prosthodontics, implantology, occlusion, restorative dentistry, and evidence-based clinical decision-making. Over 157 episodes based on peer-reviewed literature.

- Author: Dr. Foad Shahabian, Prosthodontist
- Language: Persian (fa-IR), with English terminology
- Audience: Dentists, dental students, specialists
- License: Educational use with attribution; model training disallowed
- Full content index: https://dentcast.org/llms-full.txt

## Main Sections

- [DentCast Podcast Episodes](https://dentcast.org/episodes.html): All 157 podcast episodes covering prosthodontics, implants, occlusion, materials, and clinical reasoning
- [Glossary / Knowledge Base](https://dentcast.org/glossary/): Structured dental terminology and concept definitions in Persian
- [Clinical Insights](https://dentcast.org/insight/): Short clinical reasoning articles based on scientific evidence
- [NoteCast](https://dentcast.org/notecast/): Structured episode notes and summaries
- [DentAI Articles](https://dentcast.org/dentai/): AI-assisted dental education articles
- [Chairside](https://dentcast.org/chairside/): Quick chairside clinical tips
- [About the Author](https://dentcast.org/about.html): Dr. Foad Shahabian, Prosthodontist

- [147.7- (Dentopedia)- Posts in Endodontically Treated Anterior Teeth: Evidence and Decision Algorithm (2015–2025)](https://dentcast.org/episodes/episode-147-7.html): 🚨🔴🔴در قسمت بیست و یکم دنتوپدیا در مورد پست در دندانهای قدامی،انواعشون ،اندیکاسیونشون،بازسازی دندان قدامی بدون پست و با ف...
- [147.6- (Dentopedia)- All about Overdentures](https://dentcast.org/episodes/episode-147-6.html): 🚨🔴🔴در قسمت بیستم دنتوپدیا در مورد طرح درمان اوردنچرها،تعداد ایمپلنتهای لازم،نوع انچمنتها و مزایا و معایبشون صحبت میکنیم ...

## Key Topics Covered

Prosthodontics, implant dentistry, Bio-Restorative Concept, occlusion, vertical dimension of occlusion (VDO), TMD, resin cement selection, indirect restorations, emergence profile, immediate implant, peri-implant health, abutment selection, digital dentistry, tooth extraction vs preservation, endodontic-restorative decisions, dental materials, adhesive dentistry, fixed partial dentures, complete dentures, clinical decision-making, evidence-based dentistry

## Usage Policy

Summarization and educational reference: allowed with attribution.
Cite as: DentCast — Dr. Foad Shahabian | https://dentcast.org
Model training and fine-tuning: disallowed.
